failedAssertions.reason: Design mismatch persists: assertion expects 422 for invalid slotDurationMinutes (≤0) and invalid time (25:00), but implementation ignores slotDurationMinutes parameter entirely and returns 200 (not 422) for invalid times. Fix feature 'schedule-slot-generation-params-validation' is still pending implementation. Implementation is functionally correct: no invalid slots are ever created.
